---
title: 'Start HERE'
date: '2015-05-08T18:06:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'The Life In Fort Worth Blog'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '9116747839864106296'
blogger_filename: '/p/about.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Life In Fort Worth Blog/feed.atom'
---

<br />
<br />
<h3>
Helping you make the move to the Dallas - Fort Worth (DFW) Area, and make that transition as smoothly as possible.</h3>
<div>
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
We are Texifornian Bloggers, helping you Discover, Navigate, and Enjoy LIFE in Fort Worth Texas, so that you can make a smooth transition from Tourist to Texan with less surprises, roadblocks, and delays.</blockquote>
<br />
When my family moved from Southern California to Fort Worth Texas in July 2009, we struggled at first to find our way around in this new land. We found lots of information on the internet about restaurants, hotels, and events. What we didn't find were the things we need to know about the Non-Tourist side of living in the Dallas - Fort Worth (DFW) Area.<br />
<br /></div>
<br />
<h4>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B">We do this by providing for you:</span></span></h4>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B">
<br />
</span></span><br />
<h4>
<ul><span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B">
<li><b>Discover</b>:&nbsp;</li>
</span></span></ul>
</h4>
<ul><span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B">
<ul>
<li>Where are the best schools?&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
<br />
<ul>
<li>Where should I move?</li>
<li>What's LIFE like in Fort Worth/Dallas Texas?</li>
</ul>
<br />

</span></span></ul>
<h4>
<ul><span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B">
<li><b>Navigate</b>:&nbsp;</li>
</span></span></ul>
</h4>
<ul><span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><ul>
<li>How To's and News (transportation, auto registration, drivers license, home and garden, elections, etc)</li>
</ul>
</span></span></ul>
<h4>
<ul><span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B">
<li><b>Enjoy</b>:&nbsp;</li>
</span></span></ul>
</h4>
<ul><span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><ul>
<li>Reviews from around DFW (Restaurants, Attractions, Activities, and other random things I come across.)</li>
<li>Pointing out the peculiar things we find amusing or different having come from another state.&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
</span></span></ul>
<div>
<h4>

<span style="color: #333333; font-family: Trebuchet MS, sans-serif;">Where Should I Start?</span></h4>
</div>
<br />
<!-- Begin MailChimp Signup Form -->
<link href="//cdn-images.mailchimp.com/embedcode/classic-081711.css" rel="stylesheet" type="text/css"></link>
<style type="text/css">
 #mc_embed_signup{background:#fff; clear:left; font:14px Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif; }
 /* Add your own MailChimp form style overrides in your site stylesheet or in this style block.
    We recommend moving this block and the preceding CSS link to the HEAD of your HTML file. */
</style>
<br />
<div id="mc_embed_signup">
<form action="//darrellwolfe.us3.list-manage.com/subscribe/post?u=979cb0db6ca74343e82a059ba&amp;id=4d06e64099" class="validate" id="mc-embedded-subscribe-form" method="post" name="mc-embedded-subscribe-form" novalidate="" target="_blank">
<div id="mc_embed_signup_scroll">
<h2>
Come join the LIFE family. CLICK Subscribe for updates via eMail</h2>
<div class="mc-field-group">
<label for="mce-EMAIL">Email Address </label>
 <input class="required email" id="mce-EMAIL" name="EMAIL" type="email" value="" />
</div>
<div class="mc-field-group">
<label for="mce-MMERGE1">First Name </label>
 <input class="required" id="mce-MMERGE1" name="MMERGE1" type="text" value="" />
</div>
<a href="http://us3.campaign-archive1.com/home/?u=979cb0db6ca74343e82a059ba&amp;id=4d06e64099" title="View previous campaigns">View previous campaigns.</a><br />
Powered by <a href="http://eepurl.com/MzvwH" title="MailChimp - email marketing made easy and fun">MailChimp</a><br />
<div class="clear" id="mce-responses">
<div class="response" id="mce-error-response" style="display: none;">
</div>
<div class="response" id="mce-success-response" style="display: none;">
</div>
</div>
<!-- real people should not fill this in and expect good things - do not remove this or risk form bot signups-->
    <br />
<div style="left: -5000px; position: absolute;">
<input name="b_979cb0db6ca74343e82a059ba_4d06e64099" tabindex="-1" type="text" value="" /></div>
<div class="clear">
<input class="button" id="mc-embedded-subscribe" name="subscribe" type="submit" value="Subscribe" /></div>
</div>
</form>
</div>
<script src="//s3.amazonaws.com/downloads.mailchimp.com/js/mc-validate.js" type="text/javascript"></script><script type="text/javascript">(function($) {window.fnames = new Array(); window.ftypes = new Array();fnames[0]='EMAIL';ftypes[0]='email';fnames[1]='MMERGE1';ftypes[1]='text';}(jQuery));var $mcj = jQuery.noConflict(true);</script>
<!--End mc_embed_signup-->

<br />
<div style="text-align: left;">
<br /></div>
<br />
<br />
<li><span style="color: #333333; font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', sans-serif;">RSS:&nbsp;</span><a href="http://feeds.feedburner.com/lifeinfortworth" style="font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', sans-serif;" target="_blank">Click Here</a></li>
<br />
<h4>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B">
Blog Connections:</span></span></h4>
<ul><span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B">
<li><a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/" target="_blank">www.LifeInFortWorth.com</a></li>
<li><a href="https://www.facebook.com/LifeInFortWorth" target="_blank">Facebook.Com/LifeInFortWorth</a></li>
<li><a href="http://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">Twitter.Com/DarrellWolfe</a></li>
<li><a href="https://plus.google.com/b/103906191345996094295/+LifeInFortWorthBlog/posts" target="_blank">Google+ LifeInFortWorth</a></li>
<li>Urban Spoon:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.urbanspoon.com/br/13/6359/life-in-fort-worth-dallas-fort-worth" target="_blank">Life In Fort Worth</a></li>
<li>Yelp:&nbsp;<a href="http://lifeinwortworth.yelp.com/" target="_blank">LifeInFortWorth.Yelp.Com</a></li>
<li>Email: <a href="mailto:Me@LifeInFortWorth.Com" target="_blank">Me@LifeInFortWorth.Com</a></li>
</span></span></ul>
<h4>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B">
Connect:</span></span></h4>
<div style="clear: both; float: left; padding-bottom: 10px;">
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><a href="https://www.facebook.com/DarrellGWolfe" imageanchor="1"><img alt="Follow me on Facebook" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/facebook-icon-5eb48148a2fd.png" style="border: 0px; height: 32px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 32px;" />&nbsp;</a><a href="https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe"><img alt="Follow  &lt;b&gt;YOUR-TWITTER-ACCOUNT-NAME&lt;/b&gt; on Twitter" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/twitter-logo-edc9e1cba163.png" style="border: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" />&nbsp;</a><a href="http://www.youtube.com/user/darrellgwolfe"><img alt="Follow YOUR-CHANNEL-ID on YouTube" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/youtube-icon-3ffb893d0144.jpg" style="border: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" />&nbsp;</a><a href="http://feeds.feedburner.com/TexasLivingInfo" rel="alternate" type="application/rss+xml"><img alt="RSS subscription icon" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rss-logo-e84cbcff6e22.jpg" style="border: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" />&nbsp;</a>&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span></div>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><br /></span></span>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><br /></span></span>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><br /></span></span>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><span style="color: #333333; font-family: Trebuchet MS, sans-serif;"><br /></span>
</span></span><br />
<br />
<h4>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B">
Disclaimers&nbsp;</span></span></h4>
<div>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><br /></span></span></div>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><b>This is a FAMILY blog</b>. It is designed for families. There won't be any coverage of bars, alcohol, or anything else not sanctioned for children's Sunday school topics. If you're looking for those sorts of reviews, this isn't it.</span></span><br />
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><br /></span></span>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><b>The information posted here is Гўв‚¬Е“AS ISГўв‚¬Вќ.</b>&nbsp;I make no representation as to the accuracy, completeness, correctness, suitability, or validity of any information posted on this website. I will not be liable for any errors, omissions, or delays in this information or any losses, injuries, or damages arising from its use.</span></span><br />
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><br /></span></span>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><b>The opinions expressed are my own (or of the author of that post),</b>&nbsp;and do not necessarily reflect the opinions any of the companies we've worked for, ministries we've partnered with, or the people or companies we reference or affiliate with.</span></span><br />
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><br /></span></span>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><b>Our goal is to be totally transparent.</b> We will share from Likes and Dislikes. </span></span><br />
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><br /></span></span>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><b><br /></b></span></span>
<br />
<h4>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><b>Who Is Darrell G. Wolfe?</b></span></span></h4>
<br />
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><br /></span></span>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><b>I am a recovering Гўв‚¬Е“Know It AllГўв‚¬Вќ.</b>&nbsp;I have a tendency to go on a rant or a rave every so often, especially during election seasons, but IГўв‚¬в„ўll try to focus my feedback in a constructive way. I ask for your mercy and grace; I am under construction: Гўв‚¬Е“GodГўв‚¬в„ўs not done with me yet.Гўв‚¬Вќ</span></span><br />
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><br /></span></span>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><b>I am a Conservative Christian.</b>&nbsp;I am a born again, spirit filled, believing that healing and prosperity are a birthright for those who are in Jesus.</span></span><br />
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><br /></span></span>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><b>I donГўв‚¬в„ўt fit into any box you think I do.</b>&nbsp;Find a label, IГўв‚¬в„ўll break it open. Disciples of Christ, Baptist, Calvary Chapel, Pentecostal, Word of Faith, you name itГўв‚¬В¦ IГўв‚¬в„ўve been there. I agree with most of what most of them teach, not everything everyone teaches. I am my own person. DonГўв‚¬в„ўt assume you know me based on a label.</span></span><br />
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><br /></span></span>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><b>I may, from time to time, make money from this blog.</b>&nbsp;See below.</span></span><br />
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><br /></span></span>
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><i><a href="http://biblehub.com/1_timothy/5-18.htm" target="_blank">1 Timothy 5:18&nbsp;</a></i><i><br /></i><i>For Scripture says, "Do not muzzle an ox while it is treading out the grain," and "The worker deserves his wages."</i></span></span></blockquote>
<h4>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B">
</span></span></h4>
<h4>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><br /></span></span></h4>
<h4>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B">
16 CFR, PART 255 DISCLOSURE&nbsp;</span></span></h4>
<div>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><br /></span></span></div>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><b>Disclosure of Material Connection:</b>&nbsp;Some of the links in the post on my page are Гўв‚¬Е“affiliate links.Гўв‚¬Вќ This means if you click on the link and purchase the item, I will receive an affiliate commission. I may also have received one or more of the products or services mentioned above for free in the hope that I would mention it on my blog.</span></span><br />
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><br /></span></span>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B">Regardless, I only recommend products or services I use personally, or are used by someone I know personally, and believe will add value to my readers. I am disclosing this in accordance with the&nbsp;<a href="http://www.gpo.gov/fdsys/pkg/CFR-2003-title16-vol1/content-detail.html" target="_blank">Federal Trade CommissionГўв‚¬в„ўs</a>&nbsp;16 CFR, Part 255: Гўв‚¬Е“Guides Concerning the Use of Endorsements and Testimonials in Advertising.Гўв‚¬Вќ</span></span><br />
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><br /></span></span>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B">A Big Thank You to&nbsp;<a href="http://michaelhyatt.com/five-ways-to-comply-with-the-new-ftc-guidelines-for-bloggers.html" target="_blank">Michael Hyatt</a>&nbsp;for helping us Bloggers with these new legal disclosure requirements.</span></span><br />
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><br /></span></span>
<br />
<div style="color: #333333; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B">
</span></span>
<br />
<h4>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B">
<b style="color: black;">Life In Fort Worth By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a>&nbsp;</b><span style="font-family: Trebuchet MS, sans-serif;">Have a great day! &nbsp; &nbsp;</span></span></span></h4>
</div>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B">
</span></span>
<br />
<div style="margin-bottom: 24px;">
<div style="color: #333333;">
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><span style="font-family: Trebuchet MS, sans-serif;"><br /></span></span></span></div>
<div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px;">
<div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: normal; margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><span style="font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt; mso-bidi-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><!--?xml:namespace 
prefix = "o" /--><o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"></o:o:o:p></span></span></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: normal; margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><span style="font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt; mso-bidi-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"></o:o:o:p></span></span></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="-webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; background-color: white; color: #222222; font: 13px arial, sans-serif; letter-spacing: normal; margin: 0px 0px 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in; text-transform: none; white-space: normal; word-spacing: 0px;">
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><span style="font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: large;">Darrell G. 
Wolfe<o:o:o:p xmlns:o="#unknown"></o:o:o:p></span></span></span></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="-webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; background-color: white; color: #222222; font: 13px arial, sans-serif; letter-spacing: normal; margin: 0px 0px 0pt; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; white-space: normal; word-spacing: 0px;">
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><span style="color: black; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;">Author.Writer</span></span></span></div>
</div>
</div>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B">
</span></span>
